title: Etching Scale Glass Measuring Cup-[Insulated handle | V-Shaped Spout]-Made of High Borosilicate Glass Measuring Cup for Kitchen or Restaurant, Easy to Read, 250 ML (8 Oz, 1 Cup)
description:
About this item
[Etched measurement Scales] Etched measurement scales in three units (Cup, ML, OZ) ensure that you can measuring all types of liquids and follow any cookbook,100% dishwasher safe, trust the dishwasher to clean
[Thickened bottom and wall] The thickened bottom and the thickened cup wall make you no longer worry about bumping and breaking when using in the kitchen, you can have it for a long time, we extend the service life of the cup
[Back engraving] When the cup is on the table, you don't need to pick up the cup to read the liquid capacity. There is a scale on the inside of the cup
[V-Shaped Spout]The V-shaped spout allows for better flow control, preventing spills and ensuring accurate measurements every time
[High Borosilicate Glass] Glass measuring cup is made from high-quality borosilicate glass, making it resistant to sudden temperature changes from -4°F to 302°F. This means that it can be used safely on gas stoves, microwaves, ceramic stoves, ovens, and refrigerators. The insulated handle also ensures that your hands are protected from the heat
[Comfortable and Lightweight Design] The high borosilicate glass measuring cup is lightweight, making it easy to handle and reducing the strain on your wrists. This makes it excellent for use in the kitchen, whether you're cooking, making coffee, or baking
reviews_5s:
Nice, easy to read numbers, good etching. Glad to add it to my bread-making collection!This measuring cup is glass but is so lightweight, yet is strong. But the best part about it is that when you pour from it, it doesn't drip like so many measuring cups do!Exactly what I was looking for; slim, light-weight, and easy to read!it’s a pretty good size and the handle makes it so much easier when mixing tanning solution. It is super easy to clean. The glass is pretty thick good quality.The photos show old and new measuring cups. Both hold the same amount of liquid. The old one has no markings because they have been washed off after many cleanings.
The new one has markings that have been etched on and won’t wash off.
The new one has a wider diameter and therefore is shorter. It has markings for 1/4 cup which the old one never had.I guess I understand the cheapo measuring cups having measurements painted on. But dishwashers will erase those over time. Being etched, these marking will stay and are very clear to read.It is not heavy nor oversized with a comfortable handle. Very pleased with this purchase.I liked that there is no paint to come off.I got the 4 cup measuring cup. Really love the shape and that it's glass. I previously had a plastic measuring cup that just seemed bulkier and would get those water stains. This one is so much better. It's easier to hold and pour. The etching is great too. You can see the numbers from the front or inside. Love it!Nice measuring cup. Like a scientific piece of glassware.
